Metadata.title: Hendrik Grau Investment | Buying Apartment Buildings Without Brokers
Metadata.description: Private investor for the direct purchase of apartment buildings in NRW, Berlin, and Brandenburg. No broker commission, fast execution, discreet handling, and proven solvency.
Metadata.keywords: real estate acquisition, sell apartment building, without broker, private investor, NRW, Berlin, Brandenburg, Hendrik Grau, real estate investment, residential portfolio

Hero.subtitle: Your partner for discreet and direct real estate transactions.

About.description_1: As a private investor with more than 20 years of experience in the real estate market, I personally stand behind every acquisition. My focus is on acquiring and holding apartment buildings long term in NRW, Berlin, and Brandenburg.
About.description_2: I understand the complexity and emotional value of real estate. That is why I offer fair valuations, full discretion, and a fast, transparent process.

expertise.title: Expertise
expertise.desc: More than 20 years of industry experience

Process.description: We reduce complexity to what matters most. A lean, transparent process from the first review to immediate payment.

contact.title: Initial Contact
contact.desc: Send us the key details of your property. We review everything promptly and confidentially.

valuation.title: Valuation
valuation.desc: Property viewing and market-based valuation within 48 hours.

offer.title: Offer
offer.desc: Based on the valuation, we submit a fair purchase offer with no broker commission.

closing.title: Closing
closing.desc: We ensure a fast notarization process and immediate payment of the purchase price.

locations.title: Locations
locations.desc: NRW (Münsterland and Ruhr area), Berlin, and Brandenburg.

volume.title: Volume
volume.desc: Purchase volume from €2 million to €30 million

type.title: Property Type
type.desc: Apartment buildings and residential portfolios only

condition.title: Condition
condition.desc: From well-maintained existing buildings to properties in need of refurbishment

size.title: Size
size.value: Depending on location and development potential

law.title: Building Rights
law.value: Existing, achievable at short notice, or currently being created

Footer.copyright: © 2026 Hendrik Grau Investment. All rights reserved.

Contact.description: Do you own an apartment building or plot that matches our profile? Send us the key details or call us directly. We guarantee a discreet review.

errors.missing_document: Please add at least one document (Exposé).

form.name: Name
form.message_placeholder: Property details such as address, year of construction, size...

DocumentUpload.description: Securely upload all relevant documents here, such as rent rolls, floor plans, or energy certificates, instead of sending them by email.
DocumentUpload.dropzone_title: Drop files here or click to browse
DocumentUpload.dropzone_subtitle: Supported formats: PDF, XLSX, DOCX, JPG (max. 50 MB)
DocumentUpload.success: Upload successful. We have received your documents.

Carousel.title: Selected Projects
Carousel.description: A glimpse into our portfolio of successfully realized residential projects and long-term developments.

purchase.title: Acquisition
purchase.desc: We focus on the fast and discreet acquisition of apartment buildings, with careful review of location, asset quality, and upside potential.

development.title: Development
development.desc: We develop sustainable concepts that increase the value of acquired properties and strengthen their long-term performance.

holding.title: Long-Term Holding
holding.desc: Maintaining and preserving properties for the long run is a core part of our strategy. Reliability and value retention remain our focus.

company_section.title: Grau Group
company_section.description: A strong group with coverage across the full value chain - from acquisition to long-term asset management.

broker_fees.question: Do I need to prepare documents in advance?
broker_fees.answer: No. We guide you through the entire process and help you with every relevant step.

purchase_speed.question: What sets you apart from other buyers?
purchase_speed.answer: We are straightforward, solvent, and quick to decide. Our goal is to find a fair and workable solution for everyone involved.

renovation_objects.question: Do you also buy properties in need of renovation?
renovation_objects.answer: Yes, absolutely. We specialize in real estate development and also acquire properties with deferred maintenance or vacancy.

t1.quote: Working with Mr. Grau was defined by professionalism and reliability. The transaction was completed quickly and discreetly.
t1.name: Dr. Hans-Peter Müller

t2.quote: We value the transparent communication and fair valuation. We can recommend Mr. Grau without reservation.
t2.name: Sabine Schmidt

t3.quote: A true partner on equal footing. The entire process was handled with maximum discretion and efficiency.
t3.name: Thomas Becker
